segments.text: Yahweh’s word came to me again, saying,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: What do you mean, that you use this proverb concerning the land of Israel, saying,‘The fathers have eaten sour grapes, and the children’s teeth are set on edge’?
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: “As I live,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh,
you shall not use this proverb any more in Israel.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Behold, all souls are mine; as the soul of the father, so also the soul of the son is mine. The soul who sins, he shall die.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: “But if a man is just, and does that which is lawful and right,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: and has not eaten on the mountains, hasn’t lifted up his eyes to the idols of the house of Israel, hasn’t defiled his neighbor’s wife, hasn’t come near a woman in her impurity,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
and has not wronged any, but has restored to the debtor his pledge, has taken nothing by robbery, has given his bread to the hungry, 
and has covered the naked with a garment;
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: he who hasn’t lent to them with interest, hasn’t taken any increase from them, who has withdrawn his hand from iniquity, has executed true justice between man and man,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
has walked in my statutes, and has kept my ordinances, 
to deal truly; he is just, he shall surely live,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh.
If he fathers a son who is a robber who sheds blood, and who does any one of these things,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: or who does not do any of those thingsbut has eaten at the mountain shrines and defiled his neighbor’s wife,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
has wronged the poor and needy, has taken by robbery, has not restored the pledge, and has lifted up his eyes to the idols, 
has committed abomination,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: has lent with interest, and has taken increase from the poor, shall he then live? He shall not live. He has done all these abominations. He shall surely die. His blood will be on him.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: “Now, behold, if he fathers a son who sees all his father’s sins which he has done, and fears, and doesn’t do likewise,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
who hasn’t eaten on the mountains, hasn’t lifted up his eyes to the idols of the house of Israel, 
hasn’t defiled his neighbor’s wife,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
hasn’t wronged any, hasn’t taken anything to pledge, hasn’t taken by robbery, but has given his bread to the hungry, 
and has covered the naked with a garment;
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: who has withdrawn his hand from the poor, who hasn’t received interest or increase, has executed my ordinances, has walked in my statutes; he shall not die for the iniquity of his father. He shall surely live.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: As for his father, because he cruelly oppressed, robbed his brother, and did that which is not good among his people, behold, he will die in his iniquity.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: “Yet you say, ‘Why doesn’t the son bear the iniquity of the father?’ When the son has done that which is lawful and right, and has kept all my statutes, and has done them, he will surely live.
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: The soul who sins, he shall die. The son shall not bear the iniquity of the father, neither shall the father bear the iniquity of the son. The righteousness of the righteous shall be on him, and the wickedness of the wicked shall be on him.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: “But if the wicked turns from all his sins that he has committed, and keeps all my statutes, and does that which is lawful and right, he shall surely live. He shall not die.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: None of his transgressions that he has committed will be remembered against him. In his righteousness that he has done, he shall live.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Have I any pleasure in the death of the wicked?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh,
and not rather that he should return from his way, and live?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: “But when the righteous turns away from his righteousness, and commits iniquity, and does according to all the abominations that the wicked man does, should he live? None of his righteous deeds that he has done will be remembered. In his trespass that he has trespassed, and in his sin that he has sinned, in them he shall die.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: “Yet you say, ‘The way of the Lord is not equal.’ Hear now, house of Israel: Is my way not equal? Aren’t your ways unequal?
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: When the righteous man turns away from his righteousness, and commits iniquity, and dies in it, then he dies in his iniquity that he has done.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Again, when the wicked man turns away from his wickedness that he has committed, and does that which is lawful and right, he will save his soul alive.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Because he considers, and turns away from all his transgressions that he has committed, he shall surely live. He shall not die.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Yet the house of Israel says, ‘The way of the Lord is not fair.’ House of Israel, aren’t my ways fair? Aren’t your ways unfair?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: “Therefore I will judge you, house of Israel, everyone according to his ways,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh.
Return, and turn yourselves from all your transgressions, so iniquity will not be your ruin.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Cast away from you all your transgressions in which you have transgressed; and make yourself a new heart and a new spirit. For why will you die, house of Israel?
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: For I have no pleasure in the death of him who dies,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh. “Therefore turn yourselves, and live!
